mapper.sql:
/* wms-inventory-invnattrmod-sql-oracle.xml - selectInvnAttrModRefSql - 재고 속성 변경 조회 SQL */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT '0' AS CHK , A.CTKEY , (SELECT CTNAME FROM TWORK_MST_CT CT WHERE CT.CTKEY = A.CTKEY) AS CTNAME , A.IVATKEY , A.IVATKEY AS ORG_IVATKEY , A.LCKEY , A.ULCKEY , A.OWKEY , (SELECT OWNAME FROM TWORK_MST_OW OW WHERE OW.OWKEY = A.OWKEY) AS OWNAME , A.ICKEY , D.ICNAME , COALESCE(ROUND(A.TTQTY / E.ICUTQTY, 2), 0) AS TTQTY_UNIT , COALESCE(ROUND(A.AVQTY / E.ICUTQTY, 2), 0) AS AVQTY_UNIT , COALESCE(ROUND(A.ALQTY / E.ICUTQTY, 2), 0) AS ALQTY_UNIT , COALESCE(ROUND(A.PIQTY / E.ICUTQTY, 2), 0) AS PIQTY_UNIT , COALESCE(ROUND(A.PAQTY / E.ICUTQTY, 2), 0) AS PAQTY_UNIT , COALESCE(ROUND(A.LOQTY / E.ICUTQTY, 2), 0) AS LOQTY_UNIT , COALESCE(ROUND(A.HOQTY / E.ICUTQTY, 2), 0) AS HOQTY_UNIT , COALESCE(A.TTQTY, 0) AS TTQTY , COALESCE(A.AVQTY, 0) AS AVQTY , COALESCE(A.ALQTY, 0) AS ALQTY , COALESCE(A.PIQTY, 0) AS PIQTY , COALESCE(A.PAQTY, 0) AS PAQTY , COALESCE(A.LOQTY, 0) AS LOQTY , COALESCE(A.HOQTY, 0) AS HOQTY , B.UOM , B.UOM AS CHG_UOM , G.WRHOUS_SE , B.PRODUCTDATE , B.PRODUCTLOT , B.EXPIREDATE , A.IVATSTATUS , D.SPEC , F.ACKEY , F.ACNAME , B.IBCONFIRMDATE , COALESCE(B.NET_WGT, 0) AS NET_WGT , COALESCE(B.CFQTY, 0) AS CFQTY , B.LOGGRPCD , B.ATTRIBUTE1 , B.ATTRIBUTE2 , B.ATTRIBUTE3 , B.ATTRIBUTE4 , B.ATTRIBUTE5 , B.ATTRIBUTE6 , B.ATTRIBUTE7 , B.ATTRIBUTE8 , B.ATTRIBUTE9 , A.ILBHSKEY , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULC A INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.IVATKEY = B.IVATKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC C ON A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.LCKEY = C.LCKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC D ON A.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = D.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE E ON D.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND D.OWKEY = E.OWKEY AND D.ICUTKEY = E.ICUTKEY AND B.UOM = E.ICUTTYPE LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_AC F ON D.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND D.OWKEY = F.OWKEY AND D.ACKEY = F.ACKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_AR G ON A.CTKEY = G.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = G.OWKEY AND C.ARKEY = G.ARKEY WHERE 1=1 AND A.TTQTY > 0 )
WHERE #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
mapper.select: /* wms-inventory-invnattrmod-sql-oracle.xml - selectIvatInfoMap - 재고 속성 조회 SQL */ SELECT CTKEY , IVATKEY , OWKEY , ICKEY , PRODUCTDATE , EXPIREDATE , ATTRIBUTE1 , ATTRIBUTE2 , ATTRIBUTE3 , ATTRIBUTE4 , ATTRIBUTE5 , PRODUCTLOT , IVATSTATUS , IBCONFIRMDATE , LOGGRPCD , ACKEY , STORE_KEY , ATTRIBUTE6 , ATTRIBUTE7 , ATTRIBUTE8 , ATTRIBUTE9 , IDNTFC_NO , BDDR_GNRL_ITEM_IBYN , CON_QTY , NET_WGT , CFQTY , PLT_TYPE , PLT_LOAD_QTY , PLT_LOAD_HEIGHT FROM TWORK_INFO_IVAT WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND ICKEY = #{ickey} AND UOM = #{chgUom} AND EXPIREDATE = #{expiredate}
/* wms-inventory-invnattrmod-sql-oracle.xml - selectIvatkeycount - 재고 속성 키 조회 SQL */ SELECT FN_GET_KEYCOUNT_IVAT(#{ctkey} , #{surkey}) AS IVATKEY
